sections.heading: ANNEX VII
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on losses stemming from lending collateralised by immovable property.

sections.heading: 1. Reporting scope
sections.description: Details the institutions required to report data related to immovable property.

sections.heading: 2. Definitions
sections.description: Defines key terms and concepts relevant to the reporting of losses.

sections.heading: 3. Geographical breakdown
sections.description: Outlines the templates to be reported based on geographical exposure.

sections.heading: 4. Reporting of exposures and losses
sections.description: Describes how exposures and losses should be reported.

sections.heading: 5. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Provides specific instructions related to reporting positions.

C 15.00.name: C 15.00 - Exposures secured by immovable property
C 15.00.description: Reports exposures secured by residential and commercial immovable property, detailing the risk-weighted exposure amount.

0010.name: Column 0010 - Sum of losses stemming from lending up to the reference percentages
0010.description: Collects losses from exposures with collateral up to 55% of the property value.

0030.name: Column 0030 - Sum of overall losses
0030.description: Collects overall losses from exposures with collateral up to 100% of the property value.

0050.name: Column 0050 - Sum of the exposures
0050.description: Reports exposure values for collateralised residential and commercial immovable property up to 100% of the property value.
